text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:39:23 2014
New Revision: 355198
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355198
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355198/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189561
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-POE-Component-TSTP/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-POE-Component-TSTP/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-POE-Component-TSTP/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:39:18 2014	(r355197)
+++ head/devel/p5-POE-Component-TSTP/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:39:23 2014	(r355198)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	POE component to correctly handle Ctrl-Z in your program
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-POE>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-POE
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
